judge.reason: The primary purpose of audit_add_to_parent is to add a kernel audit rule (krule) to a parent's watch list by either reusing an existing watch or creating a new one. The reference-count operations (audit_get_watch, audit_put_watch, audit_put_parent) are incidental steps within the larger business logic of rule addition, not the main focus. The function also performs list manipulation, watch matching, and parent assignment.
